## Governance

- [ ] This change does not include credentials, tokens, secrets, or private logs.
- [ ] This change does not misrepresent provider APIs, billing, quota, or usage attribution.
- [ ] This change does not create or change an official hosted service.
- [ ] Package names, release identity, and domains are intentional.
- [ ] Release evidence, provenance, package publishing, or deployment surfaces are documented when touched.
